## MVP & privacy checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (or no new lint errors)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] No real CCTV footage or personal data
- [ ] Does **not** add facial recognition
- [ ] Does **not** add automatic fine/challan flows
- [ ] Preserves human-review disclaimers where relevant
- [ ] Uses civic-intelligence / road-safety analytics language
